utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: The point is I ... I do not need this right now , Okay . It , it is too late , I am with somebody else , I am happy . This ship has sailed .

emotion_cause.span: 1_I do not need this right now , Okay . It , it is too late

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Yeah , what are you saying , you just sort of put away feelings or whatever the hell it was you felt for me ?

emotion_cause.span: 2_you just sort of put away feelings or whatever the hell it was you felt for me ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Hey , I have been doing it since the ninth grade , I have gotten pretty damn good at it .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Alright , fine , you go ahead and you do that , alright Ross .
